response.justification: Bogdan Szabo brings 17+ years of broad engineering experience and is currently at Google working on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks, which shows genuine momentum into the AI space. However, the role demands a Director-level strategic IC with recognized, deep AI expertise and a track record of advising enterprise customers and shaping cloud AI product direction — a profile this candidate does not yet match. His AI work is nascent (April 2025 onward), he holds no advanced degree in an AI-related field, and his career arc is that of a hands-on engineering craftsman rather than a strategic thought leader operating at the level this position requires.
strengths: 17+ years of diverse engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded systems, and infrastructure, meeting the minimum experience threshold
Current Google role involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, showing active and relevant entry into agentic AI development
Demonstrated entrepreneurial and community-building instincts through open-source platforms, conference talks, and workshop creation
concerns: AI expertise is very recent (April 2025 onwards) and falls well short of the 'recognized expertise with demonstrated AI products or platforms' the role requires
No Master's or PhD in an AI-related field; both degrees are in adjacent disciplines rather than AI, ML, or computer science at graduate level

Career profile is consistently that of a hands-on individual contributor and craftsman, not a Director-level strategic advisor capable of shaping cloud AI product vision and advising enterprise partners
